name: compliance

scripts.docker:build: pnpm nx run-many -t build --projects=compliance --with-deps; rm -rf .docker-build; pnpm deploy --filter compliance --prod --legacy .docker-build; docker buildx build --pull --provenance=false --build-arg WORKSPACE=${WORKSPACE:-./} --secret id=npmrc,src=$(npm get userconfig) --load -t ${PROJECT_NAME:-compliance}:$(jq -r .version package.json) .; status=$?; rm -rf .docker-build; exit $status
scripts.docker:publish: pnpm nx run-many -t build --projects=compliance --with-deps; rm -rf .docker-build; pnpm deploy --filter compliance --prod --legacy .docker-build; docker buildx build --pull --provenance=false --build-arg WORKSPACE=${WORKSPACE:-./} --secret id=npmrc,src=$(npm get userconfig) --annotation "index:org.opencontainers.image.description=Pipeline Builder compliance service — policy rules, plugin/pipeline validation, exemptions, and scans." ${DOCKER_CACHE:+--cache-from type=gha,scope=${PROJECT_NAME:-compliance} --cache-to type=gha,mode=max,scope=${PROJECT_NAME:-compliance}} --platform ${DOCKER_PLATFORMS:-linux/amd64,linux/arm64} -t ${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/mwashburn160}/${PROJECT_NAME:-compliance}:$(jq -r .version package.json) --push .; status=$?; rm -rf .docker-build; exit $status
scripts.docker:verify: docker buildx imagetools inspect ${REGISTRY:-ghcr.io/mwashburn160}/${PROJECT_NAME:-compliance}:$(jq -r .version package.json) --raw | jq -e '[(.manifests // [])[].platform.architecture] as $a | (($a | index("amd64")) and ($a | index("arm64")))'
